landing.howItWorksSubtitle: Start your journey to inner peace and professional growth in three simple steps.
landing.step1Desc: Browse through our curated list of vetted professionals across multiple specialties and healing practices.
landing.step2Desc: Choose a time that works for you, specify your goals, and seamlessly book a private, encrypted digital consultation.
landing.step3Desc: Meet your expert in our secure Dyte-powered video room. Follow up with direct messaging to continue your journey.
landing.heroSubtitle: Experience a premium social development platform designed to foster deep connections, emotional resilience, and personal growth through shared wisdom.
landing.communitySubtitle: Connect with a vibrant ecosystem of individuals dedicated to collective healing, peer support, and shared transformative experiences.
landing.feature1Desc: Instant connection with peers who understand your journey. No one walks alone in Urkio.
landing.feature2Desc: Access a library of shared stories, meditation logs, and insights from the community.
landing.feature3Desc: Join synchronized daily healing circles and group meditation sessions led by experts.
landing.expertHealingSubtitle: Learn from world-renowned practitioners specializing in mindfulness, emotional intelligence, and holistic wellness.
landing.course1Desc: A foundational guide to presence and awareness in a digital world.
landing.course2Desc: Advanced techniques for processing past trauma and emotional blocks.
landing.course3Desc: Master your nervous system through conscious breathing patterns.
landing.privacyDesc: Every interaction on Urkio is end-to-end encrypted. Your journey is yours alone. We use secure, anonymous IDs and zero-knowledge storage to ensure your sanctuary remains private.
landing.footerTagline: Redefining healing for the modern world. A platform built for humans, by humans.
landing.newsletterDesc: Weekly insights delivered to your inbox.
landing.aboutManifesto: Official Introduction & Manifesto | Edition One (Public Beta)
landing.aboutVisionTitle: 1. The Vision: A Sanctuary for Human Growth
landing.aboutVisionDesc:
In a world increasingly dominated by digital noise and superficial interactions, Urkio emerges as a sanctuary for genuine personal evolution. We believe that true self-development does not happen in isolation; it flourishes within a structured environment built on authentic human connection.

Our slogan, "Your Journey Within," reflects our core mission: to provide the tools and the community necessary for a profound exploration of your inner potential. Urkio is a social development ecosystem designed to bridge the gap between individual ambition and collective human wisdom.
landing.aboutNetworkTitle: 2. The Great Network: Connecting Experts and Seekers
landing.aboutNetworkDesc: Urkio is engineered to be a high-integrity bridge. We are building a "Great Network" where users connect deeply with Social Architects, Mentors, and Specialists. Through innovative features like our voice-driven feeling records (Homii) and secure professional messaging, we foster Real Relations for Real Humanity. This is a space where professional expertise meets the raw beauty of human vulnerability.
landing.aboutScopeNonMedicalDesc: Urkio is a developmental and social platform, not a medical or psychiatric facility. We do not provide clinical diagnoses, medical treatments, or pharmaceutical prescriptions. Our focus is strictly on mentorship, social support, and life-coaching.
landing.aboutScopeNonFinancialDesc: Our primary goal is the creation of a high-value human network. Urkio is not a platform for financial collection or monetary transactions; it is a gateway for human capital and intellectual exchange.
landing.aboutEditionDesc: Urkio is currently in Edition One, operating as a Public Beta Test. This is a deliberate period of growth where we refine our features and community dynamics. By participating, you are a foundational member of a network preparing for a Major Global Launch.
landing.aboutLegalLiabilityDesc: Urkio, its founders, and affiliates are not responsible for any bad behavior, misconduct, or individual actions of its users or experts.
landing.aboutLegalGuidanceDesc: Any information shared is for developmental purposes. Urkio is not liable for personal or professional outcomes resulting from the use of the platform.
landing.aboutLegalComplianceDesc: This platform operates in accordance with International Digital Services Laws and Local Jurisdictional Regulations. Harassment, defamation, or illegal activities will result in immediate termination of access.
landing.aboutLegalRiskDesc: As a Beta software, users participate at their own risk regarding the evolving nature of the platform.
landing.aboutClosing: Step into Urkio—where your internal evolution meets a world of real connection.
